summary: Planned Phase 1 (Registry + Types) of force-multiplier integrations: 4 tasks defining IntegrationDef/IntegrationsConfig types, 5-entry static registry, and Zod schema addition.
pending: Task 1: Define IntegrationDef and IntegrationsConfig types (TDD)
Task 2: Create static integration registry with 5 entries (TDD)
Task 3: Add IntegrationsConfigSchema to Zod config schema (TDD)
Task 4: Verify full test suite and validate
concerns: Exact npm package names for perplexity-mcp and augment-code MCP servers need verification before release -- marked with TODO comments in registry.ts
decisions: Types live in packages/cli/src/integrations/types.ts (CLI-specific, not shared types package)
Registry uses 'as const satisfies readonly IntegrationDef[]' for type safety and immutability
IntegrationsConfigSchema is exported from schema.ts for reuse by future config read/write utilities
Zod schema uses .default([]) for both enabled and dismissed arrays so empty objects parse cleanly
